languages.text: "Экспериментируй где-нибудь еще. Я справлюсь без тебя".
"Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."
languages.original_text: "Экспериментируй где-нибудь еще. Я справлюсь без тебя".

traits.locale_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."
"Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."
"Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

languages.text: 「どこか別の場所で実験をしろ。私は君なしでやっていく」
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

languages.text: "Experimentiert woanders. Ich komme auch ohne Euch zurecht."
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

traits.locale_text: "Experimentiert woanders. Ich komme auch ohne Euch zurecht."

languages.text: «Llévese sus experimentos a otra parte. No necesito de sus servicios».
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

traits.locale_text: «Llévese sus experimentos a otra parte. No necesito de sus servicios».

languages.text: "Başka bir yerde deney yap. Ben sensiz idare ederim."
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

traits.locale_text: "Başka bir yerde deney yap. Ben sensiz idare ederim."

languages.text: « Allez donc faire vos expériences ailleurs. Je me débrouillerai sans vous. »
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

traits.locale_text: « Allez donc faire vos expériences ailleurs. Je me débrouillerai sans vous. »

languages.text: “去别处做实验吧。我这里不需要你。”
languages.original_text: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."

traits.locale_text: “去别处做实验吧。我这里不需要你。”
